description: Causal PRIORS from the rare_seeds pilot profile (decision-canvas-os graph_cache.json). Used ONLY to surface candidate metric pairs for the M3 LLM judge (the structural+rare_seeds hybrid gate, implementation-kg-plan.md §5e). A prior is NOT evidence: each resolved pair is still judged + refuted + self-consistency-scored, and lands in the review queue as a proposed INFLUENCES edge -- never auto-committed, never auto-promoted to CAUSES. Endpoints are concept slugs resolved against Metric.concept_key/metric_base/metric_id at run time; a prior that resolves to no live Metric is skipped.

priors.mechanism_hint: Budget wins ad auctions
Impressions create click opportunities
Clicks drive website visits
Sessions create conversion opportunities
Conversions generate revenue
Conversions acquire customers
Customers generate lifetime value
New customers may return
Repeat purchases increase LTV
Base for churn calculation
Higher frequency increases lifetime value
Higher order values increase revenue
Better content quality (schema, structure, clarity) increases AI engine visibility
AI visibility drives organic referral traffic from AI engine answers
Higher creative performance (better imagery, copy, brand consistency) directly increases click-through rates
Higher competitor traffic in the market often correlates with overall market demand, influencing our sessions.
Industry CTR benchmarks provide context for our own CTR. Falling below benchmark signals ad quality issues.
Increased competitor ad spending drives up auction CPCs through higher competition in ad auctions.
More competitor ads in search results reduces our ad CTR through increased competition for clicks.
High audience overlap with growing competitors means shared users may shift traffic to competitor sites.
Shifts in competitor channel strategy can redistribute market traffic, affecting our organic/paid sessions.
Improving category rank correlates with increased visibility and organic traffic.
Higher competitor ad pressure forces us to increase spend to maintain ad share of voice.
Competitors with strong content strategies capture top-of-funnel traffic. Matching their content depth improves our conversion funnel.
Market share directly correlates with revenue potential. Losing share means losing addressable market.
Understanding competitor creative strategy enables differentiated ad creatives, improving click-through rates.
Stronger brand DNA extraction produces more on-brand creatives, improving performance
Higher performing ad creatives drive more clicks that convert
Better ad creative improves CTR and conversion, increasing revenue per ad dollar
Creative fatigue leads to ad blindness, directly reducing CTR
Low CTR from fatigued creatives lowers quality score, increasing CPC
Fatigued creatives directly degrade creative performance
AI visibility brings higher-intent organic traffic, improving conversion rate
AI visibility drives organic sessions that convert to revenue without ad spend
Higher content quality improves landing page trust and conversion
Landing page conversion rate is a key component of overall conversion rate
Better landing page conversion directly increases revenue
Consistent brand identity on landing pages builds trust and improves conversion
AI referrals contribute a growing share of organic sessions
Higher AI visibility means more AI engines mention and link to the site
Better content quality builds user trust, improving conversion
Competitor innovation raises the bar, accelerating creative fatigue
